completed_tasks.name: Build UsageBadge, mount in headers, migrate handleNewCollection

blockers.description: yarn tsc --noEmit crashes with SIGABRT regardless of memory — likely TypeScript compiler bug triggered by project size or a specific type. Not caused by session changes.
blockers.workaround: Skip tsc check for now; dev server (yarn dev) and Jest tests are the validation path.

human_actions_pending.action: Sign out and sign back in to pick up new JWT fields: isSuperAdmin, orgName
human_actions_pending.context: These were added to the JWT this session; existing sessions lack them. isSuperAdmin gates Database Settings in /settings; orgName shows in header.

human_actions_pending.action: Browser verification for Phase 23 Plan 03 (Task 4 checkpoint)
human_actions_pending.context: Test UsageBadge rendering, 402→modal flow, SELF_HOSTED bypass, 429 does not open modal. Full checklist in 23-03-PLAN.md Task 4.

decisions.decision: organizationId empty-string fallback in JWT treated as missing (returns empty collections)
decisions.rationale: Prevents unscoped DB queries that leaked all collections when orgId was '' not null

decisions.decision: requireRole now checks org ownership for all collection-scoped routes
decisions.rationale: Centralises the check so themes/tokens/versions sub-routes get it automatically

decisions.decision: isSuperAdmin added as boolean JWT claim (not email)
decisions.rationale: Safe — no PII in claim; gates Database Settings and App Theme sections from regular Admins

decisions.decision: orgName added to JWT at sign-in via Organization.findById
decisions.rationale: Single extra DB call at sign-in avoids per-request fetch; header shows org context without API call

next_action: User signs out/in to refresh JWT, then runs browser verification checklist from 23-03-PLAN.md Task 4. After 'approved', write 23-03-SUMMARY.md and update STATE.md to phase complete.
context_notes: Session fixed multi-tenancy leaks: new collections missing organizationId, empty-string orgId bypassing list filter, cross-org collection access via known IDs, Database Settings visible to all Admins. Also committed large semantic color migration (106 files) and added access-and-permissions.md documentation. Phase 23 Plan 03 code is done; only the human verification checkpoint remains.
